title: moogs_structures:moogs_structures_generic_jigsaw_structure
description: MSL's general-purpose jigsaw structure type with extended spawning controls.

start_pool.description: Namespaced resource location of the starting template pool.

size.description: Jigsaw expansion depth. Must be between 0 and 30.

start_height.description: HeightProvider controlling the Y position the structure starts generating at.

project_start_to_heightmap.description: If set, the structure's start Y is projected onto this heightmap before generation.

y_allowance.description: Restricts the Y range in which this structure is allowed to spawn.

min_y_allowed.description: Minimum world Y the structure may spawn at (inclusive).

max_y_allowed.description: Maximum world Y the structure may spawn at (inclusive). Must be >= min_y_allowed.

cannot_spawn_in_liquid.description: If true, prevents the structure from spawning when the surface block at the chunk centre is a liquid. Defaults to false.

terrain_height_radius_check.description: Radius in chunks over which terrain height is sampled. Required for allowed_terrain_height_range and y_allowance min checks. Range: 1–100.

allowed_terrain_height_range.description: Maximum permitted difference between the highest and lowest terrain samples within terrain_height_radius_check. Range: 1–1000.

valid_biome_radius_check.description: Radius in chunks within which all biomes must pass the structure's biome filter. Range: 1–100.

pools_that_ignore_boundaries.description: Resource locations of template pools whose pieces are allowed to extend outside the structure's bounding box.

max_distance_from_center.description: Maximum block distance a jigsaw piece may be placed from the structure centre. Range: 1–128.

burying_type.description: Post-generation vertical adjustment mode. LOWEST_CORNER aligns to the lowest bounding-box corner, AVERAGE_LAND to the average terrain height, LOWEST_SIDE to the lowest side midpoint.

use_bounding_box_hack.description: Enables a bounding box workaround for structures that fail to assemble correctly. Defaults to false.

liquid_settings.description: Controls waterlogging behaviour during structure placement.
